testcase.name: yatra_search_flight[{cabinClass=Economy, travellers=1,1,1, daysToCheck=5, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+1, return=today+9}](1)

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.25.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
